greeting: You dare approach me unbidden? Speak quickly, before I lose patience.
Another vagrant from the road. Ravensgate has no charity for drifters.
I am Lord Ashwick. You will address me with the respect my station demands.
quest: There are... dissidents in my town. People who forget their place. Find them for me, and I shall be generous.
idle: This land is mine by right and by blood.
The common folk grow restless. They need a firmer hand.
